description: Contacts who visited pricing, demo, or contact pages multiple times

models.name: HighIntentVisitors
models.sql: SELECT wa.RelatedContact_c_c__c FROM WebActivity_Home__dlm wa WHERE wa.PageVisited_c_c__c IN ('https://www.example.com/pricing', 'https://www.example.com/demo', 'https://www.example.com/contact') GROUP BY wa.RelatedContact_c_c__c HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
